title: Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey 2026 – form and related information | Stats NZ
content:
## Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey 2026 – form and related information
18 March 2026, 5:30pm
This page provides the Hedging survey form and information to help you complete it.
Please download the editable PDF file below, complete the form, and return it by email to bop@stats.govt.nz
For more information about completing the survey, download the instructions booklet or 'Everything you need to know' document below.
- E form for Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey 2026 Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 777 KB

### E form for Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey 2026
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 777 KB
To complete the form please:
- download the PDF file
- enter your reference number and business name on the cover page
- complete the questionnaire
- return the completed PDF file by email.
If you would like a paper copy of the questionnaire instead, please get in touch with us and include your reference number.
Phone 0800 809 464 Email bop@stats.govt.nz
- Everything you need to know about the Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 270 KB

### Everything you need to know about the Hedging of Overseas Foreign Currency Liabilities Survey
